docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $270.00 FILED BY EOLA TAYLOR TRUST WILCHER, LORETTA S., TRUSTEE TAYLOR, SIDNEY F., TRUSTEE AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, ADREAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-1998 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
